visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with spiky, dyed-blonde hair. He wears a dark jacket over a pink t-shirt and a silver chain necklace. He looks down with a somber expression. The background consists of closed window blinds, and the lighting is dim with a greenish tint. In the top right corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. The audio is filled with a low, tense, and suspenseful musical score that creates a feeling of unease and anticipation. The camera pans slightly to the right, revealing another man in a dark suit and tie. He has dark, wavy hair and looks off-camera with a serious, focused expression. The background remains the same dimly lit room with the blinds. The camera continues to pan, showing the first man again as he moves slightly out of frame. The shot remains a close-up, maintaining the moody and serious atmosphere of the scene. The "风行网" watermark is still present in the corner. A sharp, metallic clank, like a door or a heavy object being set down, punctuates the quiet atmosphere, adding to the dramatic and serious mood. There is no dialogue.
